raw_sections.TRAJECTORY:
The ARTEMIS-P2 spacecraft was the first to orbit the Earth-Moon L1 Lagrange
 point. 

 Trajectory prior to 2025-Jan-02 is a final reconstruction. Data after
 2025-Jan-02 is a concatenated set of periodically updated (tag-up) solution
 predictions based on tracking data through 2026-Mar-12, with prediction 
 thereafter.
